title: UML Diagram Structure
description: Structure documentation for the UML Diagram entity, describing fields, types, and relationships.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of what the diagram represents

fields.name: diagramType
fields.description: The type of UML or other diagram

fields.name: source
fields.description: Plain-text source of the diagram in the chosen markup language

fields.name: format
fields.description: The markup language / tool format used for the source

fields.name: encodedSource
fields.description: Deflate + base64url encoded source for use with PlantUML/Kroki GET endpoints

fields.name: outputUrl
fields.description: URL to the rendered diagram image

fields.name: outputFormat
fields.description: The output format of the rendered image
